CustomField.description: True if this account is currently delinquent (missed it's next payment date), false if it is current
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(Source_System__c) == "FDR", IF( (Delinquency_Cycles__c > 0) &&( PRIN_Number__c = 200) , true, false) , IF(TEXT(Source_System__c)== "Megasys", IF(( Delinquency_Cycles__c > 0) && ( Branch_Number__c = 1), true, false), false))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True if this account is currently delinquent (missed it's next payment date), false if it is current
CustomField.label: Is Delinquent
